ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Good day! I understand your need for speed and urgency in these trying times when tempests have delayed our caravans just as we've been dealing with a seal scandal, not to mention safety concerns due to steam pressure surges here at Cogline Checkpoint. While my desire is always profit through fair trade, I must ensure that each of you receives what they rightfully

the response is highly relevant, consistent with the Old Merchant persona who seeks profit without cheating and acknowledges both urgency (due to rain delay) and scarcity of healing potions. The language used maintains naturalness while addressing the player's request directly for a discounted deal in an expedient manner.
